Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf'S Further Responses To Document Requests And Compliance; Memorandum Of P/A; Declaragtion Of Joanna L. Storey; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf Gregory Chandler (Ccp 2023.010, 2023.030, 2031.310- & 2031.320)
Off Calendar Jan-22-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Defendant Luxor Cab Company's motion to compel further responses to document requests and to compel compliance (set #2) is granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to serve further responses and to produce documents within 7 days of notice of this order. The Court finds that plaintiff asserted unmeritorious objections and failed to make a reasonable and good faith effort to informally resolve the matters in dispute. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $892 are to be paid by plaintiff within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Deposition Of Ales Cerny And Req. For Judicial Ntc
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Joanna Storey for defendant and moving party: Luxor Cabs Company

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Luxor Cabs's motion to compel the deposition of Ales Cerny is granted. The Court orders that the parties meet and confer as to resuming the deposition at a mutually convenient time. The deposition shall be completed within 30 days of notice of this order. The Court finds that plaintiff disobeyed the previous order and opposed the motion without substantial justification. Monetary sanctions are awarded as follows: $930 in attorneys fees and $1,259.10 in costs. The monetary sanctions shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Nov-22-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Joanna L. Storey for defendant and opposing party: Luxor Cab Company

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Gregory Chandler's motion for a protective order is denied. The Court finds that the motion was made without substantial justification. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $930 are to be paid by plaintiff within 30 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2006 Set For Trial On Mar-12-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Feb-21-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 501
